title: Luffy Catches Blueno
description: Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Am glad I met you here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I can't see him at all!!!

summary: Luffy overwhelms Blueno and proves the crew can challenge CP9 directly, clearing the way toward Robin.
